radio.programMustHaveAudio: Program must have an audio file
radio.durationNotAvailable: File selected (duration not available, enter end time if needed)
radio.scheduleBroadcastSubtitle: Schedule the broadcast of your programs and playlists.
radio.addBreaksHint: Add breaks to schedule commercial slots
radio.enableDailyGenerationHint: Enable automatic generation of daily programming

settings.title: Settings
settings.pageSubtitle: Manage user roles and dashboard access.
settings.rolesSubtitle: Roles define the level of access to the dashboard.

roles.adminDesc: Full access to all dashboard features.
roles.crewDesc: Access to media, services and communication modules (no user management).
roles.passengerDesc: Passenger app user; no dashboard access by default.

settings.accessSubtitle: Check the modules accessible for each role. Changes apply to menu display.
settings.createUserSubtitle: Add a new user and choose their role. Dashboard access is based on role (see below).
settings.createUserFillRequired: Please fill first name, last name, email and password
settings.createUserPasswordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
settings.databasesSubtitle: List of MongoDB databases and their disk size.
settings.databasesEmpty: No databases or MongoDB not connected.
settings.shipsSubtitle: List of boats (identifiers for the passenger app). The connection limit applies to the local server: configure it in the Connexions menu.
settings.boatConfigSubtitle: This information is used across the app (restaurants, shop, boat plan).
settings.connectionLimitServerLocal: The connection limit applies to the server running this dashboard, not to individual boats.
settings.addBoatSubtitle: Create a new ship (hosting server). The slug is used by the passenger app to connect.
settings.capacityInvalid: Capacity must be a positive number or zero.
settings.limitAccessSubtitle: Maximum number of simultaneous connections allowed per ship. Leave empty for unlimited.
settings.noShips: No active ships. Add a boat above.
settings.maxConnectionsInvalid: Enter a positive number or leave empty for unlimited.
settings.confirmDeleteShipMessage: Deactivate ship "{{name}}"? It will no longer appear in the deck type list.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Detailed statistics on connections and content
analytics.connectionsHelp: Active connections are Socket.io clients connected to this server instance.
analytics.performanceHelp: Uptime is calculated since the last server restart. Other metrics will be available when monitoring is configured.
analytics.demoDataMessage: Demo data — start the backend for real statistics.

statisticsPage.title: Usage statistics
statisticsPage.subtitle: Figures and curves per module with period filters.
statisticsPage.peakUsageByHour: Peak usage during the day (by hour)
statisticsPage.selectAtLeastOneModule: Select at least one module to display statistics.

library.title: MP3 Library
library.subtitle: Audio files for radio and playlists

bibliotheque.title: Media library
bibliotheque.subtitle: Videos, images and audio on the server
bibliotheque.deleteConfirm: Delete from server? This action cannot be undone.

notifications.subtitle: Push notifications to passengers
notifications.contentByLanguageHint: Enter at least one language (title and/or message). Passengers will see the version according to their language.
notifications.noNotificationsHint: Click « Add notification » to create one (multiple languages, immediate or scheduled send).
notifications.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again.
notifications.fillOneLanguage: Fill in at least the title or message in one language.
notifications.chooseScheduleDate: Choose a date and time for scheduling.
notifications.scheduleFuture: Scheduled date must be in the future.

connexionsPage.title: Connection limit
connexionsPage.description: Configure the maximum number of simultaneous connections for this server (the one running the dashboard).
connexionsPage.unlimitedHelp: Leave empty or "Unlimited" to not restrict connections.
connexionsPage.infoNote: Note: this limit applies to the server you are connected to. The dashboard does not have access to other servers; each instance manages its own limit.
connexionsPage.invalidNumber: Enter a positive number or leave empty for unlimited
